message:
fix(orchestrator): clear stage_start on checkpoint failure to prevent elapsed time leaking across stages

Add clear_stage_start() method to EventLog and call it before logging
a stage failure in checkpoint_or_emit. Without this, a failed stage's
elapsed_ms could carry over into subsequent unrelated log entries.
Includes test verifying elapsed_ms isolation across stage boundaries.

Also sync beads tracker and br_history snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
